comment: Everdell base game card DB. Transcribed from mod 1929354615 reworked card sheets (cell ids), cross-checked against The Archive appendix glossary (pp4-17) and the mod deck tallies (copies). 48 unique main cards / 128 total; 11 forest; 16 special events; 4 basic events.

cards.name: Theater
cards.text: 1 for each Unique Critter in your city.

cards.name: Storehouse
cards.text: Place either 3 twig, 2 resin, 1 pebble, or 2 berry on this Storehouse from the supply. Visit: take all resources on this card.

cards.name: University
cards.text: Visit: discard a Critter or Construction from your city. Gain resources equal to that card's cost, then gain 1 any and 1 point.

cards.name: Twig Barge
cards.text: Gain 2 twig.

cards.name: Dungeon
cards.text: When playing a Critter or Construction, you may place a Critter from your city beneath this Dungeon to decrease the cost by up to 3 any. May not be combined with any other card-playing ability. Second cell unlocked by Ranger.

cards.name: Courthouse
cards.text: Gain 1 twig or 1 resin or 1 pebble after you play a Construction.

cards.name: Inn
cards.text: Visit: play a Critter or Construction from the Meadow for 3 fewer of any resources.

cards.name: Ever Tree
cards.text: 1 for each purple Prosperity card in your city, including this Ever Tree. May grant any 1 Critter for free.

cards.name: School
cards.text: 1 for each Common Critter in your city.

cards.name: Monastery
cards.text: Visit: give 2 any resources to an opponent and gain 4 points. Worker stays here permanently. Second spot unlocked by Monk.

cards.name: Cemetery
cards.text: Visit: reveal 4 cards from the deck or discard pile and play 1 for free. Discard the others. Worker stays here permanently. Second spot unlocked by Undertaker.

cards.name: Clock Tower
cards.text: When played, place 3 point tokens here. Before bringing back workers when Preparing for Season, you may remove 1 point token to activate a Basic or Forest location where you have a worker.

cards.name: General Store
cards.text: Gain 1 berry. If you have a Farm in your city, gain 1 additional berry.

cards.name: Mine
cards.text: Gain 1 pebble.

cards.name: Castle
cards.text: 1 for each Common Construction in your city.

cards.name: Crane
cards.text: When playing a Construction, you may discard this Crane from your city to play that Construction for 3 fewer of any resources. May not be combined with any other card-playing ability.

cards.name: Post Office
cards.text: Visit: give an opponent 2 cards, then discard any number of cards and draw up to your hand limit.

cards.name: Resin Refinery
cards.text: Gain 1 resin.

cards.name: Chapel
cards.text: Visit: place 1 point token on this Chapel, then draw 2 cards for each point token on this Chapel.

cards.name: Palace
cards.text: 1 for each Unique Construction in your city, including this Palace.

cards.name: Lookout
cards.text: Visit: copy any Basic or Forest location, even if occupied.

cards.name: Fairgrounds
cards.text: Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Ruins
cards.text: Discard a Construction from your city and place this card in that spot. Receive back that Construction's cost in resources and draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Farm
cards.text: Gain 1 berry.

cards.name: Innkeeper
cards.text: When playing a Critter, you may discard this Innkeeper from your city to decrease the cost by up to 3 berries. May not be combined with any other card-playing ability.

cards.name: Woodcarver
cards.text: You may pay up to 3 twig to gain 1 point each.

cards.name: Shopkeeper
cards.text: Gain 1 berry after you play a Critter. No berry for playing this Shopkeeper.

cards.name: Queen
cards.text: Visit: play a card worth up to 3 points for free.

cards.name: Postal Pigeon
cards.text: Reveal 2 cards. You may play 1 worth up to 3 points for free. Discard the other.

cards.name: Monk
cards.text: You may give up to 2 berries to an opponent to gain 2 points each. Unlocks the second Monastery spot.

cards.name: Bard
cards.text: You may discard up to 5 cards to gain 1 point each.

cards.name: Fool
cards.text: Play this Fool into an empty space in an opponent's city.

cards.name: Peddler
cards.text: You may pay up to 2 of your resources to gain an equal amount of any other resources.

cards.name: Wanderer
cards.text: Draw 3 cards. Does not take up a space in your city.

cards.name: Doctor
cards.text: You may pay up to 3 berries to gain 1 point each.

cards.name: Barge Toad
cards.text: Gain 2 twigs for each Farm in your city.

cards.name: Architect
cards.text: 1 for each of your unused resin and pebbles, to a maximum of 6.

cards.name: Miner Mole
cards.text: Copy 1 green Production card in an opponent's city. May not copy the Storehouse.

cards.name: Historian
cards.text: Draw 1 card after you play a Critter or Construction.

cards.name: Shepherd
cards.text: Gain 3 berries, then gain 1 point for each point token on your Chapel. If not played for free, the cost is paid to an opponent of your choice.

cards.name: Teacher
cards.text: Draw 2 cards. Keep 1 and give the other to an opponent.

cards.name: Judge
cards.text: When you play a Critter or Construction, you may replace 1 of any resource with 1 of any other. May not be combined with any other card-playing ability.

cards.name: Chip Sweep
cards.text: Activate 1 green Production card in your city.

cards.name: King
cards.text: 1 for each basic Event you achieved. 2 for each special Event you achieved.

cards.name: Ranger
cards.text: Move 1 of your deployed workers to a new location, following normal placement rules. Unlocks the second Dungeon cell.

cards.name: Undertaker
cards.text: Discard 3 cards from the Meadow, replenish, then draw 1 card from the Meadow. Unlocks the second Cemetery spot.

cards.name: Gatherer
cards.text: May share a space with a Harvester. 3 bonus points if paired with a Harvester.

cards.name: Harvester
cards.text: May share a space with a Gatherer. Gain 1 any if paired with a Gatherer and you have at least 1 Farm in your city.

forest.text: Draw 2 Meadow cards and play 1 for 1 fewer of any resource
Copy any Basic location and draw 1 card
Discard any number of cards and draw 2 for each discarded
Discard up to 3 cards and gain 1 any for each

specialEvents.name: Tax Relief
specialEvents.onAchieve: Activate all green Production cards in your city.

specialEvents.name: An Evening of Fireworks
specialEvents.onAchieve: Place up to 3 of your twigs on this Event.

specialEvents.name: Pristine Chapel Ceiling
specialEvents.onAchieve: Draw 1 card and gain 1 any for each point token on your Chapel.

specialEvents.name: Capture of the Acorn Thieves
specialEvents.onAchieve: Place up to 2 Critters from your city beneath this Event.

specialEvents.name: A Brilliant Marketing Plan
specialEvents.onAchieve: Give any combination of opponents up to a total of 3 resources. Gain 2 point tokens per resource given.

specialEvents.name: Ancient Scrolls Discovered
specialEvents.onAchieve: Reveal 5 cards. Draw any into your hand or place any beneath this Event.

specialEvents.name: A Well Run City
specialEvents.onAchieve: Bring back one of your deployed workers.

specialEvents.name: Croak Wart Cure
specialEvents.onAchieve: Pay 2 berries and discard 2 cards from your city.

specialEvents.name: Under New Management
specialEvents.onAchieve: Place up to 3 of your resources on this Event.

specialEvents.name: Performer in Residence
specialEvents.onAchieve: Place up to 3 of your berries on this Event.

specialEvents.name: Graduation of Scholars
specialEvents.onAchieve: Place up to 3 Critters from your hand beneath this Event.
